question: Did he say, "Go hide so they don't kill you," or was it different?
answer:
My husband asked me right away, "Go hide, otherwise they will kill you." 

He knew that because they were really bad; it had happened to other people already. Their husbands would flee to the mountains, but they would be captured and killed.
